articles.title_en: Senegal's power struggle: Referendum to decide on constitutional reform
articles.title_ru: Senegal's power struggle: Referendum to decide on constitutional reform
articles.preview_en: Senegal's constitional reform has caused considerable political uproar.

articles.full_en: Senegal's constitional reform has caused considerable political uproar. The public will now be asked to vote on the proposed amendments. Under a new constitution, the powers of President Faye would be reduced.
